caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I ONLY EVER DID SHIT AT" printed in white is seen in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing shop. He is sitting in front of a professional black microphone, holding a red plastic cup to his lips. In the background, several framed photos hang on the wall, and a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands beside a clothing rack. A black office chair is also visible. To the left and right of the man, logos appear on the screen, including one that reads "3" and another that says "REALLY HOT". Across the frames, the man remains in a similar position, slowly tilting his head and sipping from the red cup while looking slightly downward.
